description_long: This is a modern, single-family house set within a spacious, fenced lot featuring a variety of outdoor amenities. The house itself is rectangular with a flat roof and a clean, minimalist facade, surrounded by palm trees and sparse landscaping. Adjacent to the main building are two full-sized tennis courts with a pink surface, a circular above-ground pool, and a paved driveway leading to the entrance. The property includes a patio area with outdoor seating and a separate garage or carport structure. The windows are arranged in an asymmetrical pattern, and the main entryway is marked by a short walkway flanked by palm trees. The overall design emphasizes open space, outdoor recreation, and a contemporary architectural style.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with tennis courts, a pool, and palm landscaping on a large fenced lot. The design is minimalist and emphasizes outdoor amenities.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, tennis courts to the left, and palm trees lining the walkway.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the pool, patio seating area, and the driveway leading to the house.
description_view_2: Rear view with a clear look at the tennis courts, back patio, and the house's flat roof.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage/carport, pool, and tennis courts on the right.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a short walkway, flanked by palm trees, minimal steps, and a simple modern door without decorative overhangs.
